infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Critterboard uses the camera to identify bugs on-device. Photos never leave your phone.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Pick an existing photo of a bug to identify it on-device. We never upload your library.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Optional. Lets Critterboard prefer species that live near you. City-level fuzz, never shared unless you opt in.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Optional. Sound ID listens for cricket and cicada calls on-device only.

plugins.cameraPermission: Critterboard uses the camera to identify bugs on-device.

plugins.photosPermission: Pick an existing photo of a bug to identify it on-device.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Lets Critterboard prefer species that live near you.
